name: Grilled Shrimp & Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bamboo skewers for 1 hour before using.
2. Devein shrimp with scissors, leaving the shell intact.
3. Mix all ingredients except shrimp until blended.
4. Add shrimp and marinate for 30 minutes at room temperature or overnight in the refrigerator.
5. Drain and discard the marinade.
6. Thread shrimp onto skewers (using two parallel skewers per shrimp).
7. Cook for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes on each side.
